turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 我们先来设计一个待办事项的状态机模型。首先需要一个入口点，用星号表示启动伪状态，然后所有新建的待办事项都应该先进入一个初始的待处理状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 好的，那这个入口到初始状态的转换应该用什么事件来触发呢？

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

metadata.normalized_code:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] -- Pending
  Pending -- InProgress : Start task
  InProgress -- Completed : Complete task
  InProgress -- OnHold : Hold task
  OnHold -- InProgress : Resume task
  Completed -- Archived : Archive task
  Pending -- Deleted : Delete task
  InProgress -- Deleted : Delete task
  OnHold -- Deleted : Delete task

planner.notes: Stage 1/5, adds 2 nodes, 1 edges, current state now contains 2 nodes and 1 edges

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 就用 TodoCreatedEvent 事件吧，表示待办被创建时就会进入 Pending 状态。这个状态表示任务刚被创建，还在等待处理。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 明白了，那 Pending 状态就是我们的起点。现在我们已经有了基本的骨架，接下来要考虑待办事项的各种可能结局了。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 最理想的结局当然是任务完成了。我们添加一个 Completed 状态，作为成功完成的终端状态。待办事项的正常生命周期应该都指向这个终点。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]

metadata.normalized_code:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] -- Pending
  Pending -- InProgress : Start task
  InProgress -- Completed : Complete task
  InProgress -- OnHold : Hold task
  OnHold -- InProgress : Resume task
  Completed -- Archived : Archive task
  Pending -- Deleted : Delete task
  InProgress -- Deleted : Delete task
  OnHold -- Deleted : Delete task

planner.notes: Stage 2/5, adds 1 nodes, 0 edges, current state now contains 3 nodes and 0 edges

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: Completed 状态是个好目标。不过在它之前，我们是不是应该有个正在处理的状态？

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 先不急，我们先把主要的结局路径定义清楚。Completed 作为成功终点已经确定了，接下来应该考虑另一种可能的结局。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 那任务也有可能被取消吧？比如用户不想做了，或者发现这个任务不需要了。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]

  Pending -- Deleted : Delete task
  InProgress -- Deleted : Delete task
  OnHold -- Deleted : Delete task

planner.notes: Stage 3/5, adds 1 nodes, 0 edges, current state now contains 4 nodes and 0 edges

update.preview_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]

state_after.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 对，我们添加一个 Cancelled 状态来表示任务被取消或废弃的情况。Pending 状态的任务可以通过 TodoCancelledEvent 事件转换到 Cancelled 状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 这样 Pending 状态就有两个出路了：要么取消，要么开始处理。结构清晰多了。

gate.reason: turn 10 reached end boundary for stage 4

graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]

update.preview_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

state_after.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 现在可以添加正在处理的状态了。我们加入一个 InProgress 状态，表示任务正在被积极处理中。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 从 Pending 到 InProgress 应该用什么事件？

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 用 TodoStartedEvent 事件，表示任务开始被处理。而当任务处理完成后，从 InProgress 到 Completed 应该是 TodoCompletedEvent 事件。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 那如果已经完成的任务需要重新激活怎么办？比如发现完成得不对，需要返工。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 好问题，我们加一个 TodoReopenedEvent 从 Completed 回到 InProgress，实现任务的重新激活。另外，正在处理的任务也可能会被取消，所以从 InProgress 到 Cancelled 也要加上 TodoCancelledEvent。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 这样主要的业务流程就完整了。Pending 可以开始或取消，InProgress 可以完成或取消，Completed 可以重新打开。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 最后我们考虑一个软删除的场景。有时候用户不想彻底删除任务记录，而是标记为已删除。我们添加一个 Deleted 状态作为终端状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

  InProgress -- Deleted : Delete task

state_after.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 删除应该可以从任何非终端状态都可以触发吧？比如 Pending、InProgress、Completed，甚至 Cancelled 状态的任务都可以被删除。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 李工
turn.content: 没错，我们为所有非终端状态都加上到 Deleted 的转换，用 TodoDeletedEvent 事件。这样就覆盖了所有可能需要软删除的场景。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]

turn.speaker: 王经理
turn.content: 完美！现在状态机已经完整了。从启动到 Pending，然后分叉到 InProgress 或 Cancelled，InProgress 可以到 Completed 并能重新打开，最后任何状态都可以软删除到 Deleted。整个生命周期都覆盖了。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    state_start["[*]"]
    Pending["Pending"]
    Completed["Completed"]
    Deleted["Deleted"]
    Cancelled["Cancelled"]
